capabilities.label: Builder integration surface
capabilities.summary: Gives coding agents one machine-readable map of today/current-scope/later/no-go/owner-decision.

capabilities.label: Provider runtime seam
capabilities.summary: Makes the Shopflow-vs-runtime boundary explicit without turning the repo into a public runtime product.

capabilities.label: Thin runtime consumer snapshot
capabilities.summary: Turns the read-only Switchyard seam into concrete acquisition routes when a real base URL exists.

capabilities.label: Joined outcome bundle
capabilities.summary: Gives one joined read-only JSON bundle without hidden runtime-payload writes.

capabilities.label: Submission readiness report
capabilities.summary: Surfaces what still blocks release or submission without pretending those external steps are already done.

skills.label: Shopflow read-only runtime seam consumption
skills.summary: Keeps Switchyard seam consumption honest: read-only, repo-local, and separate from merchant live proof while serving as a starter-bundle companion for Codex and Claude Code.

skills.label: Shopflow live browser ops
skills.summary: Encodes the browser/profile ownership rules, login-attempt ceiling, and focus-safe live helper order for operator lanes, which makes the Claude Code starter bundle more plug-and-play without claiming a public skills pack.

skills.label: Shopflow builder-facing discoverability and ready-sync
skills.summary: Keeps agent-facing front doors, starter bundles, and ready-to-sync copy truthful instead of overclaiming public distribution.
mustNotClaim: Public discoverability skill pack already shipped

pluginMetadata.title: Shopflow Read-only Builder Packet
pluginMetadata.summary: Plugin-level public distribution bundle for Codex with starter bundle, sample config, install docs, proof loop, and listing payload.
pluginMetadata.boundaryNote: Starter bundle and listing payload are repo-owned today. Do not claim an official Codex plugin, official listing, or marketplace package until the real official surface and auth path are confirmed.

summary: Codex now has a plugin-level public distribution bundle with a starter packet, sample config, install docs, proof loop, and listing payload while still avoiding any official-listing claim.
boundaryNote: This bundle turns agent-specific onboarding, MCP capability prep, skills scaffolds, starter bundles, sample configs, proof loops, and plugin metadata into one repo-owned packet. It does not prove any official integration, official listing, published plugin, or distributed skills pack already exists.
mustNotClaim: Public MCP already shipped for Codex
nextHumanStep: Use the bundle as the strongest truthful public distribution surface today, and only move to an official Codex listing flow after the official surface and required auth path are both confirmed.
